name: HRA_DATA_INTEG_CHECKS
description: This table stores all the data that has issue.

columns.Name: DATA_INTEG_CHECK_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of Data Integrity Checks.

columns.Name: PARENT_ID
columns.Comments: Parent Id of Data Integrity Checks.

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: REQ_START_TIME
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler Job Start Time.

columns.Name: REQ_END_TIME
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler Job End Time.

columns.Name: PROCESS_MODE
columns.Comments: Processing Mode of Enterprise Service Scheduler job.

columns.Name: TEMPLATE_DEFN_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to hra_tmpl_defns_b.

columns.Name: TEMPLATE_NAME
columns.Comments: Performance Template Name as defined in hra_tmpl_defns_tl.

columns.Name: TMPL_PERIOD_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to hra_tmpl_periods_b.

columns.Name: CUSTOMARY_NAME
columns.Comments: Customary name of Template Periods.

columns.Name: WORKER_NAME
columns.Comments: Display name of worker in per_person_names_f.

columns.Name: MANAGER_NAME
columns.Comments: Display name of manager in per_person_names_f.

columns.Name: TABLE_NAME
columns.Comments: Table Name of the data that has issue.

columns.Name: TABLE_PK_COLUMN_NAME
columns.Comments: Primary Key column name of the issue table.

columns.Name: TABLE_PK_COLUMN_VALUE
columns.Comments: Primary Key column value of the issue table.

columns.Name: COLUMN_NAME
columns.Comments: Column Name of the data that has issue.

columns.Name: OLD_VALUE
columns.Comments: Old/Current Value of data that is wrong.

columns.Name: NEW_VALUE
columns.Comments: New/Correct Value of data that is wrong.

columns.Name: ISSUE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Category of the issue identified.

columns.Name: COMMENT_TEXT
columns.Comments: Comment text of the data quality issue.

columns.Name: ERROR_TEXT
columns.Comments: Error Text of Enterprise Service Scheduler job failure.

columns.Name: DATA_CORRECTED
columns.Comments: Flag for indentifying the data corrected or not.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
